description_long: This chaise features a minimalist, modern design with a rectangular black cushioned seat and a matching upright backrest. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a smooth, solid black material, likely faux leather or vinyl, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The frame is constructed from light-colored wood, with rounded edges and visible wood grain, adding warmth and contrast to the dark upholstery. The legs are straight and sturdy, with a simple cylindrical profile, and the back of the frame includes a horizontal wooden support bar. There are no visible armrests, giving the chaise an open and accessible feel. The overall construction suggests comfort and durability, suitable for urban parks, waiting areas, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern chaise with a black cushioned seat and backrest, supported by a light wood frame and straight cylindrical legs. The design is sleek, minimalist, and lacks armrests, making it ideal for contemporary urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat black seat and tall rectangular backrest, with the light wood frame visible at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest cushions, as well as the straight wooden legs and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal wooden support bar and the full width of the backrest, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the seat and backrest, and the clean, open side without armrests.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a tall, rectangular panel with a smooth, unsegmented surface and no visible decorative elements. It is slightly angled for ergonomic support and matches the seat in both color and material.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side, giving the chaise an open and accessible design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of light-colored wood with a natural finish. They are simple and unadorned, contributing to the modern minimalist aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid black with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two attached cushions: one forming the seat and the other forming the upright backrest. Both are rectangular, thick, and seamlessly integrated into the frame, with no loose or layered cushions visible.
